subject: address security comment on pr and add guidance to 'dev-guidance' log
instructions:
https://github.com/jess-bergs/agent-kanban/pull/24.

keep a log with notes on security-related aspects to consider when working on a ticket, and link that log in agents.md
lastOutput:
unvalidated PATCH body, no auth, `shell: true` in screenshots)
   - Agent checklist for working on server-side code

2. **`server/index.ts`** — Added `app.param('id')` middleware that validates all `:id` route parameters against a UUID regex. This is a single enforcement point that protects every current and future route using `:id` from path traversal and injection.

3. **`AGENTS.md`** — Added a Security section linking to `SECURITY.md` so agents are directed to read it before touching server code.

`★ Insight ─────────────────────────────────────`
The original PR #24 security comment flagged the *frontend* `fetch()` calls, but the real risk was on the *server side* — IDs are used in `join(TICKETS_DIR, id + ".json")` file paths and branch names that flow into shell commands. The frontend only passes back server-generated UUIDs, so the fix belongs at the API boundary, not in React.
`─────────────────────────────────────────────────`
